title: Clear/Fix SOS Button Display Issue on Home Page

requirements.text: Remove or hide the SOS button from the home page so it no longer appears in the UI. If the SOS button section is conditionally rendered based on an uploaded banner image or other state, ensure the button does not show when it should be hidden. Clear any leftover state, conditional rendering logic, or UI elements that cause the SOS button to display unexpectedly.

quotes: Bust sos button showing please clear

acceptanceCriteria: The SOS button is not visible on the home page by default.
No pulsing SOS button or SOS emergency section is rendered unless the correct display condition is explicitly met.
The home page loads without any SOS button appearing unexpectedly.
No console errors or broken layout related to the SOS button section.

constraints: Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not break other home page features such as login/logout, quick-action links, or donor search.
nonGoals: Redesigning the home page layout beyond fixing the SOS button display.
Changing backend SOS image upload logic.
